Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Versions of `bootstrap` prior to 3.4.1 for 3.x and 4.3.1 for 4.x are vulnerable to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). The  `data-template` attribute of the tooltip and popover plugins lacks input sanitization and may allow attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript.


## Recommendation

For `bootstrap` 4.x upgrade to 4.3.1 or later.
